Light Source: 635nm, 2mW, red semiconductor laser, Class I laser product.6. Alignment: auto alignment  7. Sample Dispersi on System: liquid and dry. 8. Liquid Sistem: built in ultrasonic. 9. Water cir culation: automatic self-priming water intake and drainage. 10. Optics Design: patented dual lens system 11. Dry Sistem: Pressure 0.1-0.8MPa (Continuous A djustable) 12. Dispersion Medium: Compressed air or inert gas.
